targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM [dbo].[Notifikasi] WHERE $__timeFilter(FDate)

SELECT CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN Status IN (1,4,5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN Status != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DECIMAL(5,1)) AS value FROM [dbo].[Notifikasi] WHERE $__timeFilter(FDate)

SELECT CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN Status = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN Status IN (4,5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DECIMAL(5,1)) AS value FROM [dbo].[Notifikasi] WHERE $__timeFilter(FDate)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM [dbo].[Notifikasi] WHERE Status IN (2,3) AND $__timeFilter(FDate)
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(FDate,'1h'), COUNT(*) AS 'Total' FROM [dbo].[Notifikasi] WHERE $__timeFilter(FDate) GROUP BY $__timeGroup(FDate,'1h') ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(FDate,'1h'), SUM(CASE WHEN Status IN (1,4,5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Berhasil' FROM [dbo].[Notifikasi] WHERE $__timeFilter(FDate) GROUP BY $__timeGroup(FDate,'1h') ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(FDate,'1h'), SUM(CASE WHEN Status IN (2,3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Gagal' FROM [dbo].[Notifikasi] WHERE $__timeFilter(FDate) GROUP BY $__timeGroup(FDate,'1h') ORDER BY 1

SELECT CASE Status WHEN 0 THEN '0 - Baru' WHEN 1 THEN '1 - Berhasil Dikirim' WHEN 2 THEN '2 - Gagal Invalid Token' WHEN 3 THEN '3 - Gagal Server Error' WHEN 4 THEN '4 - Diterima' WHEN 5 THEN '5 - Dibaca' END AS [Status], COUNT(*) AS [Jumlah] FROM [dbo].[Notifikasi] WHERE $__timeFilter(FDate) GROUP BY Status ORDER BY Status

SELECT r.NmJnsNotif AS [Jenis], COUNT(*) AS [Total], SUM(CASE WHEN n.Status IN (1,4,5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [Berhasil], SUM(CASE WHEN n.Status = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [Dibaca], SUM(CASE WHEN n.Status IN (2,3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [Gagal] FROM [dbo].[Notifikasi] n JOIN [dbo].[RefJnsNotif] r ON n.KdJnsNotif = r.KdJnsNotif WHERE $__timeFilter(n.FDate) GROUP BY r.NmJnsNotif ORDER BY [Total] DESC

SELECT TOP 10 CASE Status WHEN 2 THEN 'Gagal - Invalid Token' WHEN 3 THEN 'Gagal - Server Error' END AS [Tipe Gagal], Response AS [Pesan Error], COUNT(*) AS [Jumlah], CAST(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER() AS DECIMAL(5,1)) AS [Persen %] FROM [dbo].[Notifikasi] WHERE Status IN (2,3) AND Response IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(FDate) GROUP BY Status, Response ORDER BY [Jumlah] DESC

panels.title: Funnel: Sent → Delivered → Read per Jenis

targets.rawSql: SELECT r.NmJnsNotif AS [Jenis Notifikasi], COUNT(*) AS [Total Dikirim], SUM(CASE WHEN n.Status IN (1,4,5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [Berhasil ke FCM], SUM(CASE WHEN n.Status IN (4,5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [Diterima Device], SUM(CASE WHEN n.Status = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [Dibaca User], CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN n.Status IN (1,4,5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS DECIMAL(5,1)) AS [Delivery Rate %], CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN n.Status = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN n.Status IN (4,5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DECIMAL(5,1)) AS [Open Rate %], SUM(CASE WHEN n.Status IN (2,3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [Gagal] FROM [dbo].[Notifikasi] n JOIN [dbo].[RefJnsNotif] r ON n.KdJnsNotif = r.KdJnsNotif WHERE $__timeFilter(n.FDate) GROUP BY r.NmJnsNotif ORDER BY [Total Dikirim] DESC
